transcript: I walked through fire without a warning. Built my strength when no one could see. Every scar became a reminder of the woman I'm meant to be. They mistook my heart for weakness. Thought I'd stay where they left me behind. But diamonds aren't made in comfort. They're made under pressure and time. Now I walk a little taller. Now I breathe a little deeper. Every chapter brought me closer to the life that I deserve. Watch me rise like the sun after the longest night. You can't tell my soul that I was born to shine. I don't chase. I attract everything that's meant for me. I stand steady. I stand fearless. This is exactly who I'm meant to be. Watch me rise. I stopped asking for permission. stopped explaining who I am. The right people never question. The light that's living where I stand. Every no became direction. Every loss became a door. Now I think the roads that broke me, they don't know me anymore. Nothing outside defines me. Now I finally found my ground. Watch me rise like the tide that always returns. Every lesson, every blessing made me stronger than before. I don't fear, I don't fault. I was made for something more. The world didn't change me. I changed the way I see the world. This heart still soft. This soul still kind. But don't mistake my peace for something fragile. I've learned the strongest people don't need to be the loudest. They simply know who they are. Watch me rise without asking anyone to notice. Watch me shine without apologizing for my life. I don't need validation. I don't need permission. I don't need approval. I've already found myself. And that's the greatest victory. I know who I am. I know where I'm going. Nothing can stop someone who has finally come home to herself.

You took my silence as a weakness. Use my kindness for your gain. Spoke my name like it meant nothing. left me carrying the blame. I stayed soft through every shadow while you crossed every line. I kept shrinking just to keep peace. Losing pieces of my life, but something inside me changed. I can feel it in my veins. I'm done bending for people who never deserve my gra. I'M TAKING BACK MY POWER NOW. Taking back my life. No one gets to break me down. No one owns my life. I STAND STRONGER than before. You can't silence me again. I know exactly who I am and I'll never shrink for them. You try to make me doubt myself. Tried to dim what made me shine. But every scar became a lesson. Every tear became a sign. Now I walk with steady fire. Confidence inside my soul. I stopped waiting for permission. I finally took control. There's a different energy living deep inside of me. I'm no longer afraid to protect my peace. I'M TAKING BACK MY POWER NOW. Taking back my life. No one gets to break me down. No one owns my life. I stand stronger than before. You can't silence me again. I know exactly who I am. And I'll never strive for them. I was never made to live small. Never meant to hide away. Now my voice is growing louder. And my soul won't be betrayed. I forgive or try to hurt me, but I leave it all behind. Because the strongest thing I ever did was choosing myself. This time I'm taking back MY POWER NOW. Set it fully in my life. No more fear inside my body. No more giving up my life. You'll never walk over me. Never dim this fire again. I know exactly who I am. am. And now my life begins. I rise. I heal. I glow. I stand in my power now.

For so long I searched outside myself for someone to make me whole, but every road kept leading back to the healing of my soul. I carry stories that weren't mine, old fears I couldn't see, but now I'm learning how to love the deepest parts of me. I'm letting go of every doubt, every wound, every fear, making space within my heart for the love that's drawing near. I am worthy of true love, the kind that feels like home, soft and always strong, pure and safe, a love I've always known. I am worthy of open hearts, of kindness and devotion. I welcome love with open arms and trust its gentle motion. I release the need to chase. I release the need to prove. The right love won't require me to abandon my truth. I don't have to earn affection. I don't have to change who I am. The love meant for my soul will love me where I stand. So I soften into trust and allow my heart to see that the love I've been waiting for is already finding me. I am worthy of true love. love, the kind that feels like home, soft and honest, pure and safe, a love I've always known. I am worthy of open hearts, of kindness and devotion. I walk with love with open arms and trust its gentle motion. May my heart remain open. May my spirit remain light. May I recognize real love when it arrives in my life. May I choose what feels peaceful. May I choose what feels true. May the love I give myself guide the love that comes through. >> I am worthy of love. I am worthy of being chosen. I am worthy of being cherished. I am worthy of being seen. I am worthy of being heard. I am worthy of healthy love. I am worthy of safe love. I am worthy of gentle love. I am worthy of lasting love. I am worthy of unconditional love. Love I am me. Love flows to me. Love finds me. Love recognizes me. Love supports me. Love is safe for me. Love is here for me. I am worthy of true love, the kind that feels like home, soft and warm, and pure and safe, the love I've always known. I am worthy of open hearts, of kindness and devotion. I welcome love with open arms and trust its gentle motion. Love is finding me. Love is flowing to me. Love is safe for me. Love is meant for me. And I am worthy of every beautiful thing love has to give.

You looked into my eyes like you would never leave. Spoken promises you never planned to keep. I gave you every soft and honest part of me while you were hiding truths behind my back quietly. I ignored the feeling deep inside my soul, made excuses every time my heart felt cold. You slowly turned my safe place into pain and I lost myself trying to make you stay, but heartbreak opened my eyes. Now I finally realize love should never cost my peace. So I choose to set myself free. I'm taking BACK MY LIFE. TAKING BACK MY LIFE. No more crying in the dark, no more begging to be loved right. You don't get my energy. You don't get my soul. I leave the pain behind me now and finally let you go. I used to blame myself for what you chose to do, like somehow I was not enough for you, but your betrayal was never my reflection. It was your emptiness, not my imperfection. Now I see myself with clearer eyes and I know I deserve a deeper kind of love, the kind that feels peaceful, honest and safe, not something I constantly have to chase. Every tear became my strength. Every ending brought me back to the woman I forgot before the damage and the cracks. I'm taking back my life now. Taking back my life. No more shrinking for somebody who could never treat me right. You don't get my energy. You don't get my soul. I leave the pain behind me now and finally let you go. I release the memories. I release the hurt. I release the version of me who accepted less than I deserve. Now my heart belongs to me. My peace belongs to me. And I would rather walk alone than abandon myself again. I'm taking back my life. Standing stronger than before. What tried to break me only showed me what I should never settle for. Now I choose myself completely. My body and soul, I leave betrayal in the past and step into my goal. I heal. I rise. I glow again and this time I don't lose myself for love.
